rulings.Case Title: PRIYA SANGER ET AL VS. LEAH AHN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Nov. 7, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT AHE AHN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT overruled. Plaintiffs have sufficiently pled facts for the "judicial foreclosure" cause of action, and Plaintiff is not prevented from bringing this action due to the 2012 Judgment. Plaintiffs have sufficiently pled facts for the "partition by sale" cause of action, including the futility of fully obliging with Section 13.3 of the TICA. Plaintiffs have sufficiently pled facts for the "ejectment" cause of action, specifically Plaintiffs allege facts demonstrating Defendant is in wrongful possession of the property. Lastly, Plaintiffs have sufficiently pled facts seeking declaratory relief. Plaintiffs have pled facts to support they have an interest in the relief.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PRIYA SANGER ET AL VS. LEAH AHN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Nov. 7, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT LEAH AHN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT overruled. Plaintiffs have sufficiently pled facts for the "judicial foreclosure" cause of action, and Plaintiff is not prevented from bringing this action due to the 2012 Judgment. Plaintiffs have sufficiently pled facts for the "partition by sale" cause of action, including the futility of fully obliging with Section 13.3 of the TICA. Lastly, Plaintiffs have sufficiently pled facts seeking declaratory relief. The pending federal controversy does not support sustaining the demurrer as to this cause of action. = (501/CFH)
